title: 12-15 anomaly roster and content expansion
summary: Expand the validated content roster toward 12-15 anomalies and required localized content resources through data-driven definitions.
acceptance: Adds schema-compliant data-driven anomaly/content definitions toward 12-15 roster target
Includes zh-CN/en localization coverage for added player-facing content
Preserves data-only mod policy and blocks code/network/platform mods
Adds validation evidence and scenario fixtures where required
Does not add bespoke runtime code outside approved follow-up tasks

history.details: Created by WM-0111 M8 UI/i18n scope amendment DAG; remains proposed until dependencies are done.

Delivered independent M8 anomaly roster/spec artifact with 12 accepted targets, 3 stretch targets, zh-CN/en coverage expectations, scenario fixture expectations, data-mod policy alignment, and WM-0123/WM-0124 handoff notes. Protected M5 files stayed at HEAD/no-diff; verified m5-invariants, handoff validation, taskctl validate/status, diff check, and pnpm quality.

verified: No blocking findings; WM-0122 verified as repaired-scope planning artifact with 12 accepted and 3 stretch anomaly targets, zh-CN/en and fixture expectations, data-only policy/handoff, unchanged protected M5 paths and hashes, and passing required checks.
Independent reviewer verified WM-0122; integration gate passed including handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check, m5-invariants and pnpm quality; protected M5 hashes remain unchanged.

forbiddenPaths: code mods or executable mod support

review.summary: No blocking findings; WM-0122 verified as repaired-scope planning artifact with 12 accepted and 3 stretch anomaly targets, zh-CN/en and fixture expectations, data-only policy/handoff, unchanged protected M5 paths and hashes, and passing required checks.

integration.summary: Independent reviewer verified WM-0122; integration gate passed including handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check, m5-invariants and pnpm quality; protected M5 hashes remain unchanged.
